name: enterprise-tems
description: Enterprise Employee Travel & Expense Management System

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:migrate: docker exec -i tems-postgres psql -U tems_user -d tems_db < database/schema.sql
scripts.db:seed: docker exec -i tems-postgres psql -U tems_user -d tems_db < database/seeds/roles.seed.sql && docker exec -i tems-postgres psql -U tems_user -d tems_db < database/seeds/policy_rules.seed.sql && docker exec -i tems-postgres psql -U tems_user -d tems_db < database/seeds/demo_users.seed.sql
